description: Foundations Patch 2 (15 May 2024) — Changes, Combat Balance Changes.

sections.heading: Changes

items.text: The mist has receded from Albion Europe! The entire world of Albion is now accessible to players on the new server.

subitems.text: Note that newly opened territories cannot be claimed until their corresponding invasion timers are active on May 25.

items.text: Added price sort dropdown menu to Marketplace UI

sections.searchable_text: Changes The mist has receded from Albion Europe! The entire world of Albion is now accessible to players on the new server. Note that newly opened territories cannot be claimed until their corresponding invasion timers are active on May 25. Added price sort dropdown menu to Marketplace UI

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs

subitems.text: The shield is no longer removed after blocking a Forced Movement effect

subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Arcane Protection (all Arcane Staffs) The shield is no longer removed after blocking a Forced Movement effect Enigma Blade (all Arcane Staffs) Cooldown: 20 → 18

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Magic Arrow (Warbow) When target is within 6m range When target is outside 6m range

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs

subitems.text: Removed the initial cleanse when cast

subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Pulse Shock (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Damage: 135 → 124 Pounce (Prowling Staff) Range: 11m → 9m Wild Onslaught (Primal Staff) Resistance Reduction: 0.18 → 0.15 Resistance Reduction Duration: 5s → 3s Barbed Roots (Rootbound Staff) Removed the initial cleanse when cast Damage per Tick: 55 → 44

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Infernal Boulder (Hellfire Hands) 1st Boulder Bounce Damage: 210 → 199.5 2nd Boulder Bounce Damage: 140 → 133 3rd Boulder Bounce Damage: 70 → 66.5

subsections.heading: Offhands
subsections.searchable_text: Offhands Shield Bonus Defense at 1700 IP: 12% → 13.5% Sarcophagus Bonus Defense at 1700 IP: 15% → 16.875% Caitiff Shield Bonus CC Duration at 1700 IP: 10% → 20% Facebreaker Bonus Defense at 1700 IP: 8% → 9%

subsections.heading: Potions

subitems.text: Damage increased by 10% across all tiers
Resistance reduction increased by 12.5% across all tiers
Shield increased by 15% across all tiers
Fixed issue where Farming UI displayed incorrect grow rate bonus
Fixed issue where, in Arena, Item Details UI would not display as intended
Fixed issue where swapping items in inventory would not work correctly
Fixed issue where castle gates would not display on minimap or region map

items.text: Fixed issue where Barbed Roots (Rootbound Staff) shield would only block the first forced movement effect while active
Fixed issue where, in certain territories, attacking players could open Fortification Gates from the outside
Fixed issue where players could become stuck while fishing
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where Raid Banner tooltips and timers did not update correctly after interaction

subsections.searchable_text: Potions Cleansing Potion Cooldown: 120s → 90s Hellfire Potion Damage increased by 10% across all tiers Tornado in a Bottle Cooldown: 120s → 90s No longer dissolves other tornados Acid Potion Resistance reduction increased by 12.5% across all tiers Calming Potion Shield increased by 15% across all tiers UI fixes Fixed issue where Farming UI displayed incorrect grow rate bonus Fixed issue where, in Arena, Item Details UI would not display as intended Fixed issue where swapping items in inventory would not work correctly Fixed issue where castle gates would not display on minimap or region map Fixed issue where Barbed Roots (Rootbound Staff) shield would only block the first forced movement effect while active Fixed issue where, in certain territories, attacking players could open Fortification Gates from the outside Fixed issue where players could become stuck while fishing [MOBILE] Fixed issue where Raid Banner tooltips and timers did not update correctly after interaction
